{"item_id":"s199_src_05","eligible":true,"question":"","answer_point_slots":{"point_1":{"active":true,"claim":"When the link-program switch is moved to position ON during power up with the device not linked, the green LED displays 0.5 second on followed by blinking red until power up completes.","facet":"output_action_or_corrective_step","support_1":"E008_537b62c09a","support_2":"E021_65f8702483","support_3":""},"point_2":{"active":true,"claim":"During programming and linking to the system, the green LED blinks until linking and programming is completed.","facet":"input_trigger_or_observed_condition","support_1":"E010_9f14af4c18","support_2":"E020_c7ccf8244c","support_3":""},"point_3":{"active":true,"claim":"When a main battery fault occurs, the red LED displays 0.5 second on and 10 seconds off.","facet":"output_action_or_corrective_step","support_1":"E014_62008f6b27","support_2":"E027_5180baa94a","support_3":""},"point_4":{"active":true,"claim":"When both batteries fault, the LED displays 0.5 second green, 5 seconds off, then 0.5 second red.","facet":"output_action_or_corrective_step","support_1":"E017_37489b8f58","support_2":"E029_43f65af044","support_3":""}}}

{"item_id":"s199_src_06","eligible":true,"question":"","answer_point_slots":{"point_1":{"active":true,"claim":"The VTB-32E operates within a voltage range of 21 to 28 Vdc","facet":"measurement_limit_or_timing","support_1":"E007_576053e156","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_2":{"active":true,"claim":"Volume is factory set to high and tone is set to 11111 (Cranford sweep) upon delivery","facet":"option_mode_or_default","support_1":"E016_641f1b552f","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_3":{"active":true,"claim":"A suitable gland for cable entry and sealant for screw mounting holes must be used to maintain IP integrity","facet":"access_or_prerequisite","support_1":"E020_a95594d878","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_4":{"active":true,"claim":"Deep Base variant provides IP65 rating while Shallow Base variant provides IP43 rating","facet":"target_or_configuration_field","support_1":"E018_c9aab372a0","support_2":"E019_aa05f0c124","support_3":""}}}

{"item_id":"s199_src_08","eligible":true,"question":"","answer_point_slots":{"point_1":{"active":true,"claim":"The module must be installed by qualified or instructed personnel only.","facet":"access_or_prerequisite","support_1":"E015_c41cbc396f","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_2":{"active":true,"claim":"Audio inputs and outputs must be disconnected while performing wiring connections and the equipment must be disconnected from power before cabling work begins.","facet":"safety_warning_exception_or_conflict","support_1":"E016_7a4993859c","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_3":{"active":true,"claim":"An ESD wrist strap must be worn on the wrist with the other end attached to unpainted metal inside the equipment before beginning module installation.","facet":"access_or_prerequisite","support_1":"E013_8778b53c5e","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_4":{"active":false,"claim":"","facet":"","support_1":"","support_2":"","support_3":""}}}

{"item_id":"s199_src_10","eligible":true,"question":"","answer_point_slots":{"point_1":{"active":true,"claim":"Use only filtered DC power supply, not FWR (full wave rectified) power","facet":"safety_warning_exception_or_conflict","support_1":"E001_b299113f97","support_2":"","support_3":""},"point_2":{"active":true,"claim":"Verify total current of all equipment does not exceed the central power supply capacity by consulting current consumption table","facet":"verification_commissioning_or_recovery","support_1":"E001_b299113f97","support_2":"E017_259e6871b2","support_3":""},"point_3":{"active":true,"claim":"Select cable gauge appropriate to circuit length to maintain sufficient voltage at last device, accounting for voltage drop from cable resistance","facet":"target_or_configuration_field","support_1":"E002_72d1343e49","support_2":"E004_129fe6d566","support_3":"E005_d1860a0171"},"point_4":{"active":true,"claim":"Calculate voltage drop using cable resistance specifications and verify acceptable voltage at end of loop per central specifications","facet":"measurement_limit_or_timing","support_1":"E005_d1860a0171","support_2":"E011_24574f0cc3","support_3":"E014_370e56fdf0"}}}

{"item_id":"s199_src_13","eligible":true,"question":"","answer_point_slots":{"point_1":{"active":true,"claim":"Connect the mains power supply before connecting the batteries","facet":"output_action_or_corrective_step","support_1":"E008_9f5173d245","support_2":"E009_1e3a29b5c0","support_3":""},"point_2":{"active":true,"claim":"Verify there are no short or open circuits using a voltmeter before connecting mains supply","facet":"verification_commissioning_or_recovery","support_1":"E005_f78c2d9cd2","support_2":"E004_3df53c3788","support_3":""},"point_3":{"active":true,"claim":"Verify zone module circuits have 4k7 end of line resistors and sounder circuits have correct polarity with 4K7 EOL resistors","facet":"verification_commissioning_or_recovery","support_1":"E005_f78c2d9cd2","support_2":"E004_3df53c3788","support_3":""},"point_4":{"active":true,"claim":"Press TAB to start the panel if turning it on with only battery connected","facet":"output_action_or_corrective_step","support_1":"E010_feeb9c61f2","support_2":"","support_3":""}}}
